description_long: This airplane features a long, slender fuselage with a forward-mounted cockpit and a distinctive, wide wingspan positioned near the rear of the body. The wings are equipped with multiple large, cylindrical engines mounted in pairs, giving the aircraft a robust and powerful appearance. The tail section is unconventional, with a split horizontal stabilizer and a single vertical fin, contributing to a futuristic or sci-fi aesthetic. The main body is primarily a smooth, light gray material, accented by metallic and gold-toned structural elements around the midsection. The cockpit area is enclosed with a dark, glass-like canopy, and the overall surface finish is sleek and hard. No visible landing gear is present, suggesting a possible retractable or concealed configuration.
description: A futuristic, long-bodied airplane with a wide rear wingspan, multiple paired engines, and a forward-enclosed cockpit. The design features metallic and gold accents with a sleek, hard surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide wingspan with four large paired engines and the narrow, pointed nose.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated fuselage, forward cockpit, and the clustered engine arrangement under the wings.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the split horizontal stabilizer, single vertical fin, and the symmetrical engine layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the left, emphasizing the length of the fuselage and the unique tail design.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-mounted, straight wings with slight anhedral angle and no visible winglets; engines mounted in pairs under each wing.
attribute_engine_type: Eight cylindrical jet engines mounted in pairs under the wings.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and split horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No visible landing gear; likely retractable or concealed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single dark canopy, likely multi-seat.
